In vitro release profile of NP-CF-Ctn[15-34]

column2: The release profile of CF-Ctn[15-34] from nanoparticles in vitro was measured for 16 days (Figure 6).

column1: Approximately 27 % of the peptide was detected in the supernatant along the first day of testing. Of which
14 % was released in the first hour, indicating a rapid onset of peptide release. After that, a sustained release
of  CF-Ctn[15-34]  peptide  added  up  to  about  80  %  release  by  the  last  day  of  testing.  Free  peptide  was
completely in solution in the first hour.
